steps.title: Identify the object of the preposition
steps.content: The blank must be the object of the preposition “by” in “used by ______.” The rest of the sentence continues with an appositive phrase and the main clause.

steps.title: Apply the possessive rule
steps.content: Possessive forms express ownership or close association. This sentence identifies chemists as agents using the emulsifiers, not as possessors, so use the simple plural “cosmetic chemists” without possessive marking. Choices A, B, and D all violate this rule by adding unnecessary possessive forms. This matches choice C — C is correct.
